• Information and rights:If you prefer not to have your application processed using the AI-assisted tools described above, you may submit your resume directly to TA_EMEA@micron.
• Information and rights:If you prefer not to have your application processed using the AI-assisted tools described above, you may submit your resume directly to TA_EMEA@micron.
• The Platform will assign a match score based on how closely your stated and inferred skills match the requirements for the open role based on the content of your application, the Platform’s analysis described above and Micron’s configuration of the skill and AI qualification matching software.
• The Platform will assign a match score based on how closely your stated and inferred skills match the requirements for the open role based on the content of your application, the Platform’s analysis described above and Micron’s configuration of the skill and AI qualification matching software.
• Impact on Employment Decisions: The Eightfold AI recruiting software generates matching scores and skill inferences.
• Impact on Employment Decisions: The Eightfold AI recruiting software generates matching scores and skill inferences.
• Type of AI Technology: Micron uses the Eightfold AI recruiting software, a machine-learning talent-intelligence platform that uses natural-language processing to parse resumes, infer candidate skills and calculate compatibility scores with open positions.

• With a mid-year, and year-end review you'll have two windows each year to progress recognizing the pace at which you could grow.
• Join our Graduate Committee and home in on your planning, networking and co-ordination skills.
• Team members collaborate closely, applying skills in computer architecture, digital design, and programming (Python, C, SystemVerilog) while contributing directly to real-world projects from day one.
• Functional Validation: Confirming that the complete system functions as intended against architectural requirements through test plan development, test execution, and root cause analysis to ensure high product quality.
• A yearly occurrence exclusive for Graduates allowing you to hear from executive members, inspiring speakers and make connections for life.
• Problem solving skills – Take a given problem and be able to code the necessary design, verification test, or script.
• Hold (or are on track to hold) a degree in Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or Computer Science.
• Experience with C, Python, and Verilog.
